{
    "schema": "2.0",
    "description": "CHG Trigger Rules \u2014 Yoda monitors these and raises CHG+Telegram alert when triggered.",
    "lastUpdated": "2026-07-10T11:57:00+10:00",
    "lastUpdatedBy": "Yoda",
    "changeNote": "CHG-0859: Added TRIGGER-01 sub-action 01-CLOUD-OUTAGE-PROBE \u2014 Ollama Cloud outage probe + local OC2 fallback, deferred from CHG-0858 outage-detect no-op.",
    "triggers": {
        "TRIGGER-01": {
            "name": "OC2 Arrival \u2014 Master Gate",
            "condition": "OC2-A and OC2-B physically arrive",
            "detection": "manual \u2014 Ken notifies Yoda",
            "eta": "6\u201313 Jul 2026",
            "status": "not_applicable",
            "firedAt": null,
            "closureNote": "OC2-A/B arrival gate closed; only OC2A commissioned as single-node PROD. HA pair deferred. See CHG-1783.",
            "description": "OC2 arrival is now the master gate. All OC2-era actions are sequenced as sub-actions under TRIGGER-01, executed in priority order after hardware is online.",
            "subActions": [
                {
                    "id": "01-PHYSICAL",
                    "name": "Hardware Setup",
                    "priority": "critical",
                    "action": "Unbox OC2-A + OC2-B. Connect power, network, Tailscale. Verify both nodes reachable on tailnet."
                },
                {
                    "id": "01-OPENCLAW",
                    "name": "OpenClaw Install on OC2-A/B",
                    "priority": "critical",
                    "action": "Install OpenClaw v2026.5.27+ on OC2-A (primary) and OC2-B (standby). Configure HIVE HA pair. Deploy tech agent fleet (~10 agents: Yoda, Atlas, Thrawn, Forge, Lando, Mon Mothma, Warden, Ahsoka, Luthen; Shield/Lex/Sage stay here). Krennic parked."
                },
                {
                    "id": "01-CLAUDE-RESTORE",
                    "name": "CLAUDE RESTORE \u2014 Anthropic API Key Re-provisioning",
                    "priority": "high",
                    "action": "Ken provides new Anthropic API key. Execute SOP: (1) Store in Keychain as 'ainchors-anthropic-api-key', (2) Add auth.profiles.anthropic:default to openclaw.json, (3) Add anthropic model aliases, (4) Update model-policy.json whitelist, (5) Run validate-fallback-chain.sh, (6) Restore agent primary models from claude-restore-config.json.",
                    "linkedChgs": [
                        "CHG-0349",
                        "CHG-0373",
                        "CHG-0393"
                    ],
                    "linkedTkts": [
                        "TKT-0165",
                        "TKT-0241"
                    ],
                    "note": "Folded from standalone TRIGGER-14 per Ken directive 2026-05-29. Claude Restore now gates on OC2 arrival \u2014 no point restoring on OC1 when platform is about to migrate."
                },
                {
                    "id": "01-PLATFORM-SEPARATION",
                    "name": "Platform Separation \u2014 OC1 Business Standalone",
                    "priority": "high",
                    "action": "Execute Platform Separation per approved option paper. Phase 1: Wipe OC1, fresh OpenClaw install, deploy 6 business agents (Aria lead + Shield/Lex/Sage duplicated + Spark + Forge-ops). Phase 2: OC2 tech platform validated \u22651 week before OC1 wipe. Phase 3: Cutover Angie/KL team to OC1 business node. Phase 4: Stabilisation.",
                    "linkedDocs": [
                        "docs/options/Platform-Separation-Business-Stream-Option-Paper-v1.0.md",
                        "docs/options/Platform-Separation-Business-Stream-Feasibility-Assessment-v1.0.md"
                    ],
                    "kenDecisions": [
                        "C1: Second OpenClaw license \u2705",
                        "C2: Separate Ollama Cloud sub \u2705",
                        "C3: New Google Workspace for tech \u2705"
                    ],
                    "acceptedRisks": [
                        "No SRE on business node",
                        "Governance Triad divergence",
                        "Double maintenance overhead"
                    ],
                    "note": "Platform Separation approved 2026-05-29. Phase 0 prep can start now. Full migration gated on OC2 arrival + validation."
                },
                {
                    "id": "01-PG-MIGRATION",
                    "name": "PostgreSQL Migration OC1 \u2192 OC2",
                    "priority": "high",
                    "action": "Restore PG from OC1 backup to OC2-A. Configure HA replication to OC2-B. Validate all 32 tables, ticket state, cost history. Slim PG on OC1 (business-only tables or PG-free)."
                },
                {
                    "id": "01-A",
                    "name": "qwen3.5:cloud Reassessment",
                    "priority": "low",
                    "action": "Re-benchmark qwen3.5:cloud on OC2. Re-test with think:false on all 5 benchmark tasks. If avg latency \u226420s \u2192 approve for async/batch Tier 2. If still fails \u2192 close out permanently."
                },
                {
                    "id": "01-B",
                    "name": "Orchestrator MD Version Bump",
                    "priority": "high",
                    "action": "Version bump SOUL.md + YODA_RULES.md + ORCHESTRATOR.md to reflect OC2 architecture, HA state, Gemma4:26b local inference, Platform Separation."
                },
                {
                    "id": "01-C",
                    "name": "SecretRefs Keychain Integration",

                    "action": "Implement SecretRefs with macOS Keychain integration (TKT-0228). Migrate all API keys from hardcoded config to structured SecretRefs.",
                    "ticket": "TKT-0228"
                },
                {

                    "name": "Tech Stream Google Workspace",
                    "priority": "high",
                    "action": "Create new Google Workspace for tech stream (C3). Migrate Yoda/tech agent auth from kenmun@ainchors.com to new account. Aria keeps kenmun@ on OC1 business node."
                },

                    "id": "01-CLOUD-OUTAGE-PROBE",
                    "name": "Ollama Cloud Outage Probe + Local OC2 Fallback",
                    "priority": "high",
                    "action": "Design and implement a proper Ollama Cloud outage probe (not localhost:11434). Validate against model-policy.json and run full outage/standby drill.",

                        "TRIGGER-03"
                    ],
                    "linkedChgs": [

                        "CHG-0859"
                    ],

                    ],

                },
                {
                    "id": "01-OC2A-PRODUCTION",
                    "name": "OC2A Fresh Install \u2014 Option 4 Strong Separation",
                    "priority": "critical",
                    "action": "Execute docs/plans/OC2A-Fresh-Install-Plan-v1.0.md. OC2A becomes self-governing full production Nexus; OC1 demoted to non-privileged sandbox with no admin path to OC2A. Phases sequenced as TKT-0757 through TKT-0762. Begin after 01-PHYSICAL and 01-OPENCLAW complete.",

                        "TKT-0760",

                    ],

                }
            ]
        },
